'''Excargans'''<ref name="The Essential Reader's Companion">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> were a [[Near-Human]]<ref name="Near-Human">Although ''[[Boba Fett: Crossfire]]'' uses the word [[Humanoid/Legends|"humanoid"]] for [[Garr]], it further says Garr is "like [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba]] [Fett]," who is [[Human/Legends|Human]], and compares their [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and skin [[Color/Legends|colors]]. From this description, it can be reasonably assumed that Excargans are [[Near-Human]].</ref> [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to [[Excarga/Legends|Excarga]]. During childhood, they were [[Gender/Legends|genderless]]; at around thirteen [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old, their bodies would change and their gender would be determined.<ref name="Boba Fett: Crossfire" /> Many inhabitants of their [[Planet/Legends|planet]] worked for [[Ore/Legends|ore]]-processing corporations. They were [[Battle of Excarga|attacked]] by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]],<ref name="CSWE Excarga">{{CSWECite|I|245|Excarga}}</ref> which led to [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] intervention,<ref name="Boba Fett: Crossfire" /> and they sold materials to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="CSWE Excarga" />

[[Garr]], whose [[Garr's mother|mother]] and [[Garr's father|father]] were presumed dead after a Separatist [[Battle of Excarga|attack]], befriended fellow orphan [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] after Boba was rescued during the [[Conquest of Raxus Prime]].<ref name="Boba Fett: Crossfire" />
